title: Antag, a startup backed by Versant and Novo, joins hunt for obesity drug alternatives
summary: Danish startup Antag Therapeutics has raised $84 million in a Series A round led by Versant Ventures to advance AT-7687, an experimental GIP antagonist for weight loss. Unlike GLP-1 agonists that activate the GIP receptor, AT-7687 blocks it — a different approach still under scientific debate — with the backing of cofounders University of Copenhagen professors Jens Holst and Mette Rosenkilde.
analysis_notes: Article content successfully extracted despite noisy BioPharma Dive page elements. Drug name referenced inconsistently as AT-7687 and AT-7607 in the article — likely a typo but noted.
